001package org.gbif.predicate.query;
002
003import static org.gbif.api.util.IsoDateParsingUtils.ISO_DATE_FORMATTER;
004import static org.gbif.predicate.query.SQLColumnsUtils.HUMBOLDT_TAXON_COLUMNS;
005import static org.gbif.predicate.query.SQLColumnsUtils.isInterpretedUtcDateMilliseconds;
006
007import jakarta.annotation.Nullable;
008import java.lang.reflect.InvocationTargetException;
009import java.lang.reflect.Method;
010import java.time.Instant;
011import java.time.LocalDate;
012import java.time.ZoneOffset;
013import java.util.*;
014import java.util.function.Function;
015import java.util.stream.Collectors;
016import lombok.RequiredArgsConstructor;
017import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
018import org.gbif.api.exception.QueryBuildingException;
019import org.gbif.api.model.Constants;
020import org.gbif.api.model.common.search.SearchParameter;
021import org.gbif.api.model.occurrence.search.InternalOccurrenceSearchParameter;
022import org.gbif.api.model.occurrence.search.OccurrenceSearchParameter;
023import org.gbif.api.model.predicate.CompoundPredicate;
024import org.gbif.api.model.predicate.ConjunctionPredicate;
025import org.gbif.api.model.predicate.DisjunctionPredicate;
026import org.gbif.api.model.predicate.EqualsPredicate;
027import org.gbif.api.model.predicate.GeoDistancePredicate;
028import org.gbif.api.model.predicate.GreaterThanOrEqualsPredicate;
029import org.gbif.api.model.predicate.GreaterThanPredicate;
030import org.gbif.api.model.predicate.InPredicate;
031import org.gbif.api.model.predicate.IsNotNullPredicate;
032import org.gbif.api.model.predicate.IsNullPredicate;
033import org.gbif.api.model.predicate.LessThanOrEqualsPredicate;
034import org.gbif.api.model.predicate.LessThanPredicate;
035import org.gbif.api.model.predicate.LikePredicate;
036import org.gbif.api.model.predicate.NotPredicate;
037import org.gbif.api.model.predicate.Predicate;
038import org.gbif.api.model.predicate.RangePredicate;
039import org.gbif.api.model.predicate.SimplePredicate;
040import org.gbif.api.model.predicate.WithinPredicate;
041import org.gbif.api.query.QueryVisitor;
042import org.gbif.api.util.IsoDateInterval;
043import org.gbif.api.util.IsoDateParsingUtils;
044import org.gbif.api.util.Range;
045import org.gbif.api.util.SearchTypeValidator;
046import org.gbif.api.util.VocabularyUtils;
047import org.gbif.api.vocabulary.MediaType;
048import org.gbif.dwc.terms.*;
049import org.locationtech.jts.geom.Envelope;
050import org.locationtech.jts.geom.Geometry;
051import org.locationtech.jts.geom.MultiPolygon;
052import org.locationtech.spatial4j.context.jts.DatelineRule;
053import org.locationtech.spatial4j.context.jts.JtsSpatialContextFactory;
054import org.locationtech.spatial4j.io.WKTReader;
055import org.locationtech.spatial4j.shape.Rectangle;
056import org.locationtech.spatial4j.shape.Shape;
057import org.locationtech.spatial4j.shape.impl.RectangleImpl;
058import org.locationtech.spatial4j.shape.jts.JtsGeometry;
059
060@RequiredArgsConstructor
061@Slf4j
062public class SQLQueryVisitor<S extends SearchParameter> implements QueryVisitor {
063
064  private static final String CONJUNCTION_OPERATOR = " AND ";
065  private static final String DISJUNCTION_OPERATOR = " OR ";
066  private static final String EQUALS_OPERATOR = " = ";
067  private static final String IN_OPERATOR = " IN";
068  private static final String GREATER_THAN_OPERATOR = " > ";
069  private static final String GREATER_THAN_EQUALS_OPERATOR = " >= ";
070  private static final String LESS_THAN_OPERATOR = " < ";
071  private static final String LESS_THAN_EQUALS_OPERATOR = " <= ";
072  private static final String NOT_OPERATOR = "NOT ";
073  private static final String LIKE_OPERATOR = " LIKE ";
074  private static final String IS_NOT_NULL_OPERATOR = " IS NOT NULL";
075  private static final String IS_NULL_OPERATOR = " IS NULL";
076  private static final String IS_NOT_NULL_ARRAY_OPERATOR = "(%1$s IS NOT NULL AND size(%1$s) > 0)";
077  private static final String IS_NULL_ARRAY_OPERATOR = "(%1$s IS NULL OR size(%1$s) = 0)";
078  // where query to execute a select all
079  private static final String ALL_QUERY = "true";
080
081  private static final String SQL_ARRAY_PRE = "ARRAY";
082
083  private static final Function<Term, String> ARRAY_FN =
084      t -> "stringArrayContains(" + SQLColumnsUtils.getSQLQueryColumn(t) + ",'%s',%b)";
085
086  private static final Function<Term, String> ARRAY_LIKE_FN =
087      t -> "stringArrayLike(" + SQLColumnsUtils.getSQLQueryColumn(t) + ",'%s',%b)";
088
089  private static final List<GbifTerm> NUB_KEYS =
090      List.of(
091          GbifTerm.taxonKey,
092          GbifTerm.acceptedTaxonKey,
093          GbifTerm.kingdomKey,
094          GbifTerm.phylumKey,
095          GbifTerm.classKey,
096          GbifTerm.orderKey,
097          GbifTerm.familyKey,
098          GbifTerm.genusKey,
099          // GbifTerm.subgenusKey, Excluded as it is not populated by interpretation.
100          GbifTerm.speciesKey);
101
102  // TODO: handle derived taxon params for events
103  private static final Set<SearchParameter> TAXON_SEARCH_PARAMETERS =
104      Set.of(
105          OccurrenceSearchParameter.KINGDOM_KEY,
106          OccurrenceSearchParameter.PHYLUM_KEY,
107          OccurrenceSearchParameter.CLASS_KEY,
108          OccurrenceSearchParameter.ORDER_KEY,
109          OccurrenceSearchParameter.FAMILY_KEY,
110          OccurrenceSearchParameter.SUBGENUS_KEY,
111          OccurrenceSearchParameter.GENUS_KEY,
112          OccurrenceSearchParameter.SPECIES_KEY,
113          OccurrenceSearchParameter.TAXON_KEY,
114          OccurrenceSearchParameter.ACCEPTED_TAXON_KEY);
115
116  private static final List<GadmTerm> GADM_GIDS =
117      List.of(GadmTerm.level0Gid, GadmTerm.level1Gid, GadmTerm.level2Gid, GadmTerm.level3Gid);
118
119  private StringBuilder builder;
120
121  private final SQLTermsMapper<S> sqlTermsMapper;
122
123  private final String defaultChecklistKey;
124
125  /** Transforms the value to the SQL statement lower(val). */
126  protected String toSQLLower(String val) {
127    return "lower(" + val + ")";
128  }
129
130  protected String toSQLField(S param, boolean matchCase) {
131    return Optional.ofNullable(term(param))
132        .map(
133            term -> {
134              String sqlCol = SQLColumnsUtils.getSQLQueryColumn(term);
135              if (String.class.isAssignableFrom(param.type())
136                  && (param != OccurrenceSearchParameter.GEOMETRY)
137                  && !matchCase) {
138                return toSQLLower(sqlCol);
139              }
140              return sqlCol;
141            })
142        .orElseThrow(
143            () ->
144                // QueryBuildingException requires an underlying exception
145                new IllegalArgumentException(
146                    "Search parameter " + param.type().getName() + "." + param + " is not mapped"));
147  }
148
149  /**
150   * Allow support for querying the denormalized extension.
151   *
152   * <p>FIXME - this can probably be factored out once all required fields are denormalized.
153   *
154   * @param param
155   * @param matchCase
156   * @return
157   */
158  protected String toSQLDenormField(S param, boolean matchCase) {
159    return Optional.ofNullable(term(param))
160        .map(
161            term -> {
162              if (term instanceof DwcTerm) {
163                DwcTerm dwcTerm = (DwcTerm) term;
164                String field = "Denorm.parents." + dwcTerm.simpleName();
165                if (String.class.isAssignableFrom(param.type())
166                    && !"GEOMETRY".equals(param.name())
167                    && !matchCase) {
168                  return toSQLLower(field);
169                }
170                return field;
171              }
172              return null;
173            })
174        .orElseThrow(
175            () ->
176                // QueryBuildingException requires an underlying exception
177                new IllegalArgumentException(
178                    "Search parameter " + param + " is not mapped to Hive"));
179  }
180
181  /**
182   * Converts a value to the form expected by Hive based on the SearchParameter. Most values pass by
183   * unaltered. Quotes are added for values that need to be quoted, escaping any existing quotes.
184   *
185   * @param param the type of parameter defining the expected type
186   * @param value the original query value
187   * @return the converted value expected by Hive
188   */
189  protected String toSQLValue(S param, String value, boolean matchCase) {
190    if (Enum.class.isAssignableFrom(param.type())) {
191      // all enum parameters are uppercase
192      return '\'' + value.toUpperCase() + '\'';
193    }
194
195    if (Date.class.isAssignableFrom(param.type())) {
196      // use longs for timestamps expressed as ISO dates
197      LocalDate ld = IsoDateParsingUtils.parseDate(value);
198      Instant i = ld.atStartOfDay(ZoneOffset.UTC).toInstant();
199      if (isInterpretedUtcDateMilliseconds(term(param))) {
200        return String.valueOf(i.toEpochMilli());
201      } else {
202        return String.valueOf(i.getEpochSecond());
203      }
204
205    } else if (Number.class.isAssignableFrom(param.type())
206        || Boolean.class.isAssignableFrom(param.type())) {
207      // do not quote numbers
208      return value;
209
210    } else {
211      // quote value, escape existing quotes
212      String strVal = '\'' + value.replaceAll("'", "\\\\'") + '\'';
213      if (String.class.isAssignableFrom(param.type())
214          && !"GEOMETRY".equals(param.name())
215          && !matchCase) {
216        return toSQLLower(strVal);
217      }
218      return strVal;
219    }
220  }
221
222  /**
223   * Translates a valid {@link org.gbif.api.model.occurrence.Download} object and translates it into
224   * a strings that can be used as the <em>WHERE</em> clause for a SQL (hive or spark) download.
225   *
226   * @param predicate to translate
227   * @return WHERE clause
228   */
229  public String buildQuery(Predicate predicate) throws QueryBuildingException {
230    String query = ALL_QUERY;
231    if (predicate != null) { // null predicate means a SELECT ALL
232      builder = new StringBuilder();
233      visit(predicate);
234      query = builder.toString();
235    }
236
237    // Set to null to prevent old StringBuilders hanging around in case this class is reused
238    // somewhere else
239    builder = null;
240    return query;
241  }
242
243  public void visit(ConjunctionPredicate predicate) throws QueryBuildingException {
244    visitCompoundPredicate(predicate, CONJUNCTION_OPERATOR);
245  }
246
247  public void visit(DisjunctionPredicate predicate) throws QueryBuildingException {
248    // See if this disjunction can be simplified into an IN predicate, which is much faster.
249    // We could overcomplicate this:
250    //   A=1 OR A=2 OR B=3 OR B=4 OR C>5 → A IN(1,2) OR B IN (3,4) OR C>5
251    // but that's a very unusual query for us, so we just check for
252    // - EqualsPredicates everywhere
253    // - on the same search parameter.
254
255    boolean useIn = true;
256    Boolean matchCase = null;
257    List<String> values = new ArrayList<>();
258    S parameter = null;
259    String checklistsKey = null;
260
261    for (Predicate subPredicate : predicate.getPredicates()) {
262      if (subPredicate instanceof EqualsPredicate) {
263        EqualsPredicate<S> equalsSubPredicate = (EqualsPredicate<S>) subPredicate;
264        if (parameter == null) {
265          parameter = equalsSubPredicate.getKey();
266          matchCase = equalsSubPredicate.isMatchCase();
267          checklistsKey = getChecklistKey(equalsSubPredicate.getChecklistKey());
268        } else if (parameter != equalsSubPredicate.getKey()
269            || matchCase != equalsSubPredicate.isMatchCase()
270            || !Objects.equals(
271                checklistsKey, getChecklistKey(equalsSubPredicate.getChecklistKey()))) {
272          useIn = false;
273          break;
274        }
275        values.add(equalsSubPredicate.getValue());
276      } else {
277        useIn = false;
278        break;
279      }
280    }
281
282    if (useIn) {
283      visit(new InPredicate<>(parameter, values, matchCase, checklistsKey));
284    } else {
285      visitCompoundPredicate(predicate, DISJUNCTION_OPERATOR);
286    }
287  }
288
289  public Function<Term, String> getArrayFn() {
290    return ARRAY_FN;
291  }
292
293  /** Supports all parameters incl taxonKey expansion for higher taxa. */
294  public void visit(EqualsPredicate<S> predicate) throws QueryBuildingException {
295    if (isHumboldtTaxonParameter(predicate.getKey())) {
296      appendHumboldtTaxonFilter(predicate);
297    } else if (TAXON_SEARCH_PARAMETERS.contains(predicate.getKey())) {
298      appendTaxonomicArrayFilter(predicate, GbifInternalTerm.classifications);
299    } else if (predicate.getKey() == OccurrenceSearchParameter.TAXONOMIC_ISSUE) {
300      appendTaxonomicArrayFilter(predicate, GbifTerm.taxonomicIssue);
301    } else if (predicate.getKey() == OccurrenceSearchParameter.TAXONOMIC_STATUS) {
302      appendTaxonomicSingleValueFilter(predicate, GbifInternalTerm.taxonomicStatuses);
303    } else if (predicate.getKey() == OccurrenceSearchParameter.GADM_GID) {
304      appendGadmFilterList(GADM_GIDS, predicate.getValue());
305    } else if (predicate.getKey() == OccurrenceSearchParameter.MEDIA_TYPE) {
306      Optional.ofNullable(VocabularyUtils.lookupEnum(predicate.getValue(), MediaType.class))
307          .ifPresent(
308              mediaType ->
309                  builder.append(
310                      String.format(
311                          getArrayFn().apply(GbifTerm.mediaType), mediaType.name(), true)));
312    } else if (predicate.getKey() == OccurrenceSearchParameter.ISSUE) {
313      builder.append(
314          String.format(
315              getArrayFn().apply(GbifTerm.issue), predicate.getValue().toUpperCase(), true));
316    } else if (sqlTermsMapper.isArray(predicate.getKey())) {
317      builder.append(
318          String.format(
319              getArrayFn().apply(sqlTermsMapper.getTermArray(predicate.getKey())),
320              predicate.getValue().replaceAll("'", "\\\\'"),
321              predicate.isMatchCase()));
322    } else if (sqlTermsMapper.isDenormedTerm(predicate.getKey())) {
323      builder
324          .append("(")
325          .append("(")
326          .append(toSQLField(predicate.getKey(), predicate.isMatchCase()))
327          .append(EQUALS_OPERATOR)
328          .append(toSQLValue(predicate.getKey(), predicate.getValue(), predicate.isMatchCase()))
329          .append(") OR (")
330          .append("stringArrayContains(")
331          .append(toSQLDenormField(predicate.getKey(), true))
332          .append(",")
333          .append(toSQLValue(predicate.getKey(), predicate.getValue(), true))
334          .append("))")
335          .append(")");
336    } else if (SQLColumnsUtils.isVocabulary(term(predicate.getKey()))) {
337      builder.append(
338          String.format(getArrayFn().apply(term(predicate.getKey())), predicate.getValue(), false));
339    } else if (Date.class.isAssignableFrom(predicate.getKey().type())) {
340      // Dates may contain a range even for an EqualsPredicate (e.g. "2000" or "2000-02")
341      // The user's query value is inclusive, but the parsed dateRange is exclusive of the
342      // upperBound to allow including the day itself.
343      //
344      // I.e. a predicate value 2000/2005-03 gives a dateRange [2000-01-01,2005-04-01)
345      Range<LocalDate> dateRange = IsoDateParsingUtils.parseDateRange(predicate.getValue());
346
347      if (dateRange.hasLowerBound() || dateRange.hasUpperBound()) {
348        builder.append('(');
349        if (dateRange.hasLowerBound()) {
350          visitSimplePredicate(
351              predicate,
352              GREATER_THAN_EQUALS_OPERATOR,
353              ISO_DATE_FORMATTER.format(dateRange.lowerEndpoint()));
354          if (dateRange.hasUpperBound()) {
355            builder.append(CONJUNCTION_OPERATOR);
356          }
357        }
358        if (dateRange.hasUpperBound()) {
359          visitSimplePredicate(
360              predicate, LESS_THAN_OPERATOR, ISO_DATE_FORMATTER.format(dateRange.upperEndpoint()));
361        }
362        builder.append(')');
363      }
364    } else if (IsoDateInterval.class.isAssignableFrom(predicate.getKey().type())) {
365      // Dates may contain a range even for an EqualsPredicate (e.g. "2000" or "2000-02")
366      // The user's query value is inclusive, but the parsed dateRange is exclusive of the
367      // upperBound to allow including the day itself.
368      //
369      // I.e. a predicate value 2000/2005-03 gives a dateRange [2000-01-01,2005-04-01)
370      Range<LocalDate> dateRange = IsoDateParsingUtils.parseDateRange(predicate.getValue());
371
372      if (dateRange.hasLowerBound() || dateRange.hasUpperBound()) {
373        // all the stuff here
374        builder.append('(');
375        if (dateRange.hasLowerBound()) {
376          SimplePredicate predicateGte =
377              new EqualsPredicate<>(
378                  InternalOccurrenceSearchParameter.EVENT_DATE_GTE,
379                  predicate.getValue(),
380                  predicate.isMatchCase());
381          visitSimplePredicate(
382              predicateGte,
383              GREATER_THAN_EQUALS_OPERATOR,
384              ISO_DATE_FORMATTER.format(dateRange.lowerEndpoint()));
385          if (dateRange.hasUpperBound()) {
386            builder.append(CONJUNCTION_OPERATOR);
387          }
388        }
389        if (dateRange.hasUpperBound()) {
390          SimplePredicate predicateLte =
391              new EqualsPredicate<>(
392                  InternalOccurrenceSearchParameter.EVENT_DATE_LTE,
393                  predicate.getValue(),
394                  predicate.isMatchCase());
395          visitSimplePredicate(
396              predicateLte,
397              LESS_THAN_OPERATOR,
398              ISO_DATE_FORMATTER.format(dateRange.upperEndpoint()));
399        }
400        builder.append(')');
401      }
402    } else if (predicate.getKey() == OccurrenceSearchParameter.GEOLOGICAL_TIME) {
403      if (SearchTypeValidator.isNumericRange(predicate.getValue())) {
404        Range<Double> range = SearchTypeValidator.parseDecimalRange(predicate.getValue());
405        if (range.hasLowerBound()) {
406          builder
407              .append("geologicaltime.gt")
408              .append(GREATER_THAN_EQUALS_OPERATOR)
409              .append(range.lowerEndpoint());
410        }
411        if (range.hasUpperBound()) {
412          if (range.hasLowerBound()) {
413            builder.append(CONJUNCTION_OPERATOR);
414          }
415          builder
416              .append("geologicaltime.lte")
417              .append(LESS_THAN_EQUALS_OPERATOR)
418              .append(range.upperEndpoint());
419        }
420      } else {
421        builder
422            .append(predicate.getValue())
423            .append(GREATER_THAN_OPERATOR)
424            .append("geologicaltime.gt")
425            .append(CONJUNCTION_OPERATOR)
426            .append(predicate.getValue())
427            .append(LESS_THAN_EQUALS_OPERATOR)
428            .append("geologicaltime.lte");
429      }
430    } else {
431      visitSimplePredicate(predicate, EQUALS_OPERATOR);
432    }
433  }
434
435  public void visit(GreaterThanOrEqualsPredicate<S> predicate) throws QueryBuildingException {
436    if (Date.class.isAssignableFrom(predicate.getKey().type())) {
437      // Where the date is a range, consider the "OrEquals" to mean including the whole range.
438      // "2000" includes all of 2000.
439      Range<LocalDate> dateRange = IsoDateParsingUtils.parseDateRange(predicate.getValue());
440      visitSimplePredicate(
441          predicate,
442          GREATER_THAN_EQUALS_OPERATOR,
443          ISO_DATE_FORMATTER.format(dateRange.lowerEndpoint()));
444    } else if (IsoDateInterval.class.isAssignableFrom(predicate.getKey().type())) {
445      // Where the date is a range, consider the "OrEquals" to mean including the whole range.
446      // "2000" includes all of 2000.
447      Range<LocalDate> dateRange = IsoDateParsingUtils.parseDateRange(predicate.getValue());
448      SimplePredicate predicateLte =
449          new GreaterThanOrEqualsPredicate<>(
450              InternalOccurrenceSearchParameter.EVENT_DATE_LTE, predicate.getValue());
451      visitSimplePredicate(
452          predicateLte,
453          GREATER_THAN_EQUALS_OPERATOR,
454          ISO_DATE_FORMATTER.format(dateRange.lowerEndpoint()));
455    } else {
456      visitSimplePredicate(predicate, GREATER_THAN_EQUALS_OPERATOR);
457    }
458  }
459
460  public void visit(GreaterThanPredicate<S> predicate) throws QueryBuildingException {
461    if (Date.class.isAssignableFrom(predicate.getKey().type())) {
462      // Where the date is a range, consider the lack of "OrEquals" to mean excluding the whole
463      // range.
464      // "2000" excludes all of 2000, so the earliest date is 2001-01-01.
465      Range<LocalDate> dateRange = IsoDateParsingUtils.parseDateRange(predicate.getValue());
466      visitSimplePredicate(
467          predicate,
468          GREATER_THAN_EQUALS_OPERATOR,
469          ISO_DATE_FORMATTER.format(dateRange.upperEndpoint()));
470    } else if (IsoDateInterval.class.isAssignableFrom(predicate.getKey().type())) {
471      // Where the date is a range, consider the lack of "OrEquals" to mean excluding the whole
472      // range.
473      // "2000" excludes all of 2000, so the earliest date is 2001-01-01.
474      Range<LocalDate> dateRange = IsoDateParsingUtils.parseDateRange(predicate.getValue());
475      SimplePredicate predicateLte =
476          new GreaterThanPredicate<>(
477              InternalOccurrenceSearchParameter.EVENT_DATE_LTE, predicate.getValue());
478      visitSimplePredicate(
479          predicateLte,
480          GREATER_THAN_EQUALS_OPERATOR,
481          ISO_DATE_FORMATTER.format(dateRange.upperEndpoint()));
482
483    } else {
484      visitSimplePredicate(predicate, GREATER_THAN_OPERATOR);
485    }
486  }
487
488  public void visit(LessThanOrEqualsPredicate<S> predicate) throws QueryBuildingException {
489    if (Date.class.isAssignableFrom(predicate.getKey().type())) {
490      // Where the date is a range, consider the "OrEquals" to mean including the whole range.
491      // "2000" includes all of 2000, so the latest date is 2001-01-01 (not inclusive).
492      Range<LocalDate> dateRange = IsoDateParsingUtils.parseDateRange(predicate.getValue());
493      visitSimplePredicate(
494          predicate, LESS_THAN_OPERATOR, ISO_DATE_FORMATTER.format(dateRange.upperEndpoint()));
495    } else if (IsoDateInterval.class.isAssignableFrom(predicate.getKey().type())) {
496      // Where the date is a range, consider the "OrEquals" to mean including the whole range.
497      // "2000" includes all of 2000, so the latest date is 2001-01-01 (not inclusive).
498      Range<LocalDate> dateRange = IsoDateParsingUtils.parseDateRange(predicate.getValue());
499      SimplePredicate predicateGte =
500          new LessThanOrEqualsPredicate<>(
501              InternalOccurrenceSearchParameter.EVENT_DATE_GTE, predicate.getValue());
502      visitSimplePredicate(
503          predicateGte, LESS_THAN_OPERATOR, ISO_DATE_FORMATTER.format(dateRange.upperEndpoint()));
504    } else {
505      visitSimplePredicate(predicate, LESS_THAN_EQUALS_OPERATOR);
506    }
507  }
508
509  public void visit(LessThanPredicate<S> predicate) throws QueryBuildingException {
510    if (Date.class.isAssignableFrom(predicate.getKey().type())) {
511      // Where the date is a range, consider the lack of "OrEquals" to mean excluding the whole
512      // range.
513      // "2000" excludes all of 2000, so the latest date is 2000-01-01 (not inclusive).
514      Range<LocalDate> dateRange = IsoDateParsingUtils.parseDateRange(predicate.getValue());
515      visitSimplePredicate(
516          predicate, LESS_THAN_OPERATOR, ISO_DATE_FORMATTER.format(dateRange.lowerEndpoint()));
517    } else if (IsoDateInterval.class.isAssignableFrom(predicate.getKey().type())) {
518      // Where the date is a range, consider the lack of "OrEquals" to mean excluding the whole
519      // range.
520      // "2000" excludes all of 2000, so the latest date is 2000-01-01 (not inclusive).
521      Range<LocalDate> dateRange = IsoDateParsingUtils.parseDateRange(predicate.getValue());
522      SimplePredicate predicateGte =
523          new LessThanPredicate<>(
524              InternalOccurrenceSearchParameter.EVENT_DATE_GTE, predicate.getValue());
525      visitSimplePredicate(
526          predicateGte, LESS_THAN_OPERATOR, ISO_DATE_FORMATTER.format(dateRange.lowerEndpoint()));
527    } else {
528      visitSimplePredicate(predicate, LESS_THAN_OPERATOR);
529    }
530  }
531
532  public void visit(RangePredicate<S> predicate) throws QueryBuildingException {
533    builder.append("((");
534
535    if (!Objects.isNull(predicate.getValue().getGte())) {
536      visitSimplePredicate(
537          new LessThanOrEqualsPredicate<>(predicate.getKey(), predicate.getValue().getGte()),
538          GREATER_THAN_EQUALS_OPERATOR);
539    } else {
540      visitSimplePredicate(
541          new LessThanPredicate<>(predicate.getKey(), predicate.getValue().getGt()),
542          GREATER_THAN_OPERATOR);
543    }
544
545    builder.append(")");
546    builder.append(CONJUNCTION_OPERATOR);
547    builder.append("(");
548
549    if (!Objects.isNull(predicate.getValue().getLte())) {
550      visitSimplePredicate(
551          new GreaterThanOrEqualsPredicate<>(predicate.getKey(), predicate.getValue().getLte()),
552          LESS_THAN_EQUALS_OPERATOR);
553    } else {
554      visitSimplePredicate(
555          new GreaterThanOrEqualsPredicate<>(predicate.getKey(), predicate.getValue().getLt()),
556          LESS_THAN_OPERATOR);
557    }
558    builder.append("))");
559  }
560
561  /*
562   * For large disjunctions, IN predicates are around 3× faster than a perfectly balanced tree of
563   * OR predicates, and around 2× faster than a fairly flat OR query.
564   *
565   * With Hive 1.3.0, balancing OR queries should be internal to Hive:
566   *   https://jira.apache.org/jira/browse/HIVE-11398
567   * but it is probably still better to use an IN, which uses a hash table lookup internally:
568   *   https://jira.apache.org/jira/browse/HIVE-11415#comment-14651085
569   */
570  public void visit(InPredicate<S> predicate) throws QueryBuildingException {
571    log.info("InPredicate " + predicate);
572
573    boolean isMatchCase = Optional.ofNullable(predicate.isMatchCase()).orElse(Boolean.FALSE);
574
575    if (isSQLArray(predicate.getKey()) || SQLColumnsUtils.isVocabulary(term(predicate.getKey()))) {
576      // Array values must be converted to ORs.
577      builder.append('(');
578      Iterator<String> iterator = predicate.getValues().iterator();
579      while (iterator.hasNext()) {
580        // Use the equals predicate to get the behaviour for array.
581        visit(new EqualsPredicate<S>(predicate.getKey(), iterator.next(), isMatchCase));
582        if (iterator.hasNext()) {
583          builder.append(DISJUNCTION_OPERATOR);
584        }
585      }
586      builder.append(')');
587    } else if (isHumboldtTaxonParameter(predicate.getKey())) {
588      appendHumboldtTaxonFilter(predicate);
589    } else if (predicate.getKey() == OccurrenceSearchParameter.TAXON_KEY
590        && (predicate.getChecklistKey() == null
591            || Constants.NUB_DATASET_KEY
592                .toString()
593                .equalsIgnoreCase(predicate.getChecklistKey()))) {
594      // Use the taxonkey, specieskey etc columns for performance. Users are encouraged to make
595      // downloads with 10,000s of taxon identifiers, and performance of this will need to be
596      // adequate before the classifications column can be used.
597      appendTaxonomicBackboneArrayFilter(predicate);
598    } else if (TAXON_SEARCH_PARAMETERS.contains(predicate.getKey())) {
599      appendTaxonomicArrayFilter(predicate, GbifInternalTerm.classifications);
600    } else if (predicate.getKey() == OccurrenceSearchParameter.TAXONOMIC_ISSUE) {
601      appendTaxonomicArrayFilter(predicate, GbifTerm.taxonomicIssue);
602    } else if (predicate.getKey() == OccurrenceSearchParameter.TAXONOMIC_STATUS) {
603      appendTaxonomicSingleValueFilter(predicate, GbifInternalTerm.taxonomicStatuses);
604    } else if (predicate.getKey().name().equals("GADM_GID")) {
605      // GADM GIDs must be expanded into a disjunction of in predicates
606      appendGadmGidFilter(predicate.getValues());
607    } else if (predicate.getKey().name().equals("EVENT_DATE")) {
608      // Event dates must be expanded into a disjunction of conjunction predicates (of comparisons)
609      builder.append('(');
610      Iterator<String> iterator = predicate.getValues().iterator();
611      while (iterator.hasNext()) {
612        // Use the equals predicate to get the behaviour for event dates.
613        visit(new EqualsPredicate<S>(predicate.getKey(), iterator.next(), isMatchCase));
614        if (iterator.hasNext()) {
615          builder.append(DISJUNCTION_OPERATOR);
616        }
617      }
618      builder.append(')');
619
620    } else {
621      builder
622          .append('(')
623          .append(toSQLField(predicate.getKey(), isMatchCase))
624          .append(IN_OPERATOR)
625          .append('(');
626      Iterator<String> iterator = predicate.getValues().iterator();
627      while (iterator.hasNext()) {
628        builder.append(toSQLValue(predicate.getKey(), iterator.next(), isMatchCase));
629        if (iterator.hasNext()) {
630          builder.append(", ");
631        }
632      }
633      builder.append(")");
634
635      // this block can be removed in future if we don't need a denormalized
636      // AVRO extension
637      if (sqlTermsMapper.isDenormedTerm(predicate.getKey())) {
638        builder.append(" OR ").append('(');
639
640        Iterator<String> iterator2 = predicate.getValues().iterator();
641        while (iterator2.hasNext()) {
642          builder
643              .append('(')
644              // FIX ME
645              .append("array_contains(")
646              .append(toSQLDenormField(predicate.getKey(), true))
647              .append(',')
648              .append(toSQLValue(predicate.getKey(), iterator2.next(), true))
649              .append(')')
650              .append(')');
651          if (iterator2.hasNext()) {
652            builder.append(" OR ");
653          }
654        }
655        builder.append(")");
656      }
657      builder.append(")");
658    }
659  }
660
661  public void visit(LikePredicate<S> predicate) throws QueryBuildingException {
662    if (sqlTermsMapper.isArray(predicate.getKey())) {
663      builder.append(
664          String.format(
665              ARRAY_LIKE_FN.apply(sqlTermsMapper.getTermArray(predicate.getKey())),
666              predicate.getValue().replaceAll("'", "\\\\'"),
667              predicate.isMatchCase()));
668    } else {
669      // Replace % → \% and _ → \_
670      // Then replace * → % and ? → _
671      LikePredicate<S> likePredicate =
672          new LikePredicate<>(
673              predicate.getKey(),
674              predicate
675                  .getValue()
676                  .replace("%", "\\%")
677                  .replace("_", "\\_")
678                  .replace('*', '%')
679                  .replace('?', '_'),
680              predicate.isMatchCase());
681
682      visitSimplePredicate(likePredicate, LIKE_OPERATOR);
683    }
684  }
685
686  public void visit(NotPredicate predicate) throws QueryBuildingException {
687    builder.append(NOT_OPERATOR);
688    visit(predicate.getPredicate());
689  }
690
691  public void visit(IsNotNullPredicate<S> predicate) throws QueryBuildingException {
692    if (isHumboldtTaxonParameter(predicate.getParameter())) {
693      appendHumboldtTaxonUnary(
694          getChecklistKey(predicate.getChecklistKey()), IS_NOT_NULL_ARRAY_OPERATOR);
695    } else if (isSQLArray(predicate.getParameter())
696        || SQLColumnsUtils.isVocabulary(term(predicate.getParameter()))) {
697      builder.append(
698          String.format(IS_NOT_NULL_ARRAY_OPERATOR, toSQLField(predicate.getParameter(), true)));
699    } else if (TAXON_SEARCH_PARAMETERS.contains(predicate.getParameter())) {
700      appendTaxonKeyIsNotNull(predicate);
701    } else if (predicate.getParameter() == OccurrenceSearchParameter.GADM_GID) {
702      appendUnaryList(GADM_GIDS, IS_NOT_NULL_OPERATOR);
703    } else {
704      // matchCase: Avoid adding an unnecessary "lower()" when just testing for null.
705      builder.append(toSQLField(predicate.getParameter(), true));
706      builder.append(IS_NOT_NULL_OPERATOR);
707    }
708  }
709
710  public void visit(IsNullPredicate<S> predicate) throws QueryBuildingException {
711    if (TAXON_SEARCH_PARAMETERS.contains(predicate.getParameter())) {
712      appendTaxonKeyNull(predicate);
713    } else if (isHumboldtTaxonParameter(predicate.getParameter())) {
714      appendHumboldtTaxonUnary(
715          getChecklistKey(predicate.getChecklistKey()), IS_NULL_ARRAY_OPERATOR);
716    } else if (predicate.getParameter() == OccurrenceSearchParameter.GADM_GID) {
717      appendUnaryList(GADM_GIDS, IS_NULL_OPERATOR);
718    } else {
719      // matchCase: Avoid adding an unnecessary "lower()" when just testing for null.
720      if (isSQLArray(predicate.getParameter())) {
721        builder.append(
722            String.format(IS_NULL_ARRAY_OPERATOR, toSQLField(predicate.getParameter(), true)));
723      } else {
724        builder.append(toSQLField(predicate.getParameter(), true));
725        builder.append(IS_NULL_OPERATOR);
726      }
727    }
728  }
729
730  /** Searches any of the NUB keys in Hive of any rank. */
731  private void appendTaxonKeyIsNotNull(IsNotNullPredicate<S> predicate) {
732    builder.append('(');
733    builder.append(
734        String.format(
735            "classificationdetails['%s']['%s'] != ''",
736            getChecklistKey(predicate.getChecklistKey()),
737            predicate.getParameter().name().replace("_", "").toLowerCase()));
738    builder.append(')');
739  }
740
741  /** Searches any of the NUB keys in Hive of any rank. */
742  private void appendTaxonKeyNull(IsNullPredicate<S> predicate) {
743    builder.append('(');
744    builder.append(
745        String.format(
746            "classificationdetails['%s']['%s'] = ''",
747            getChecklistKey(predicate.getChecklistKey()),
748            predicate.getParameter().name().replace("_", "").toLowerCase()));
749    builder.append(')');
750  }
751
752  public void visit(WithinPredicate within) throws QueryBuildingException {
753    JtsSpatialContextFactory spatialContextFactory = new JtsSpatialContextFactory();
754    spatialContextFactory.normWrapLongitude = true;
755    spatialContextFactory.srid = 4326;
756    spatialContextFactory.datelineRule = DatelineRule.ccwRect;
757
758    WKTReader reader =
759        new WKTReader(spatialContextFactory.newSpatialContext(), spatialContextFactory);
760
761    try {
762      // the geometry must be valid - it was validated in the predicates constructor
763      Shape geometry = reader.parse(within.getGeometry());
764
765      builder.append('(');
766      String withinGeometry;
767
768      // Add an additional filter to a bounding box around any shapes that aren't quadrilaterals, to
769      // speed up the query.
770      if (geometry instanceof JtsGeometry
771          && ((JtsGeometry) geometry).getGeom().getNumPoints() != 5) {
772        Geometry g = ((JtsGeometry) geometry).getGeom();
773        // Use the Spatial4J-fixed geometry; this is split into a multipolygon if it crosses the
774        // antimeridian.
775        withinGeometry = g.toText();
776
777        Rectangle bounds = geometry.getBoundingBox();
778        boundingBox(bounds);
779        builder.append(CONJUNCTION_OPERATOR);
780
781        // A tool (R?) can generate hundreds of tiny areas spread across the globe, all in a single
782        // multipolygon.
783        // Add bounding boxes for these too.
784        // Example: https://www.gbif.org/occurrence/download/0187894-210914110416597
785        if (g instanceof MultiPolygon && g.getNumGeometries() > 2) {
786          builder.append("((");
787          for (int i = 0; i < g.getNumGeometries(); i++) {
788            if (i > 0) {
789              // Too many clauses exceeds Hive's query parsing stack.
790              if (i % 500 == 0) {
791                builder.append(')');
792                builder.append(DISJUNCTION_OPERATOR);
793                builder.append('(');
794              } else {
795                builder.append(DISJUNCTION_OPERATOR);
796              }
797            }
798            Geometry gi = g.getGeometryN(i);
799            Envelope env = gi.getEnvelopeInternal();
800            boundingBox(
801                new RectangleImpl(
802                    env.getMinX(),
803                    env.getMaxX(),
804                    env.getMinY(),
805                    env.getMaxY(),
806                    geometry.getContext()));
807          }
808          builder.append("))");
809          builder.append(CONJUNCTION_OPERATOR);
810        }
811      } else {
812        withinGeometry = within.getGeometry();
813      }
814      builder
815          .append("contains('")
816          .append(withinGeometry)
817          .append("', ")
818          .append(SQLColumnsUtils.getSQLQueryColumn(DwcTerm.decimalLatitude))
819          .append(", ")
820          .append(SQLColumnsUtils.getSQLQueryColumn(DwcTerm.decimalLongitude));
821      // Without the "= TRUE", the expression may evaluate to TRUE or FALSE for all records,
822      // depending
823      // on the data format (ORC, Avro, Parquet, text) of the table (!).
824      // We could not reproduce the issue on our test cluster, so it seems safest to include this.
825      builder.append(") = TRUE").append(')');
826    } catch (Exception e) {
827      throw new QueryBuildingException(e);
828    }
829  }
830
831  public void visit(GeoDistancePredicate geoDistance) throws QueryBuildingException {
832    builder
833        .append("(geoDistance(")
834        .append(geoDistance.getGeoDistance().getLatitude())
835        .append(", ")
836        .append(geoDistance.getGeoDistance().getLongitude())
837        .append(", '")
838        .append(geoDistance.getGeoDistance().getDistance().toString())
839        .append("', ")
840        .append(SQLColumnsUtils.getSQLQueryColumn(DwcTerm.decimalLatitude))
841        .append(", ")
842        .append(SQLColumnsUtils.getSQLQueryColumn(DwcTerm.decimalLongitude))
843        .append(") = TRUE)");
844  }
845
846  /**
847   * Given a bounding box, generates greater than / lesser than queries using decimalLatitude and
848   * decimalLongitude to form a bounding box.
849   */
850  private void boundingBox(Rectangle bounds) {
851    builder
852        .append('(')
853        // Latitude is easy:
854        .append(SQLColumnsUtils.getSQLQueryColumn(DwcTerm.decimalLatitude))
855        .append(GREATER_THAN_EQUALS_OPERATOR)
856        .append(bounds.getMinY())
857        .append(CONJUNCTION_OPERATOR)
858        .append(SQLColumnsUtils.getSQLQueryColumn(DwcTerm.decimalLatitude))
859        .append(LESS_THAN_EQUALS_OPERATOR)
860        .append(bounds.getMaxY())
861        .append(CONJUNCTION_OPERATOR)
862
863        // Longitude must take account of crossing the antimeridian:
864        .append('(')
865        .append(SQLColumnsUtils.getSQLQueryColumn(DwcTerm.decimalLongitude))
866        .append(GREATER_THAN_EQUALS_OPERATOR)
867        .append(bounds.getMinX());
868    if (bounds.getMinX() < bounds.getMaxX()) {
869      builder.append(CONJUNCTION_OPERATOR);
870    } else {
871      builder.append(DISJUNCTION_OPERATOR);
872    }
873    builder
874        .append(SQLColumnsUtils.getSQLQueryColumn(DwcTerm.decimalLongitude))
875        .append(LESS_THAN_EQUALS_OPERATOR)
876        .append(bounds.getMaxX())
877        .append(')')
878        .append(')');
879  }
880
881  /**
882   * Builds a list of predicates joined by 'op' statements. The final statement will look like this:
883   *
884   * <p>
885   *
886   * <pre>
887   * ((predicate) op (predicate) ... op (predicate))
888   * </pre>
889   */
890  public void visitCompoundPredicate(CompoundPredicate predicate, String op)
891      throws QueryBuildingException {
892    builder.append('(');
893    Iterator<Predicate> iterator = predicate.getPredicates().iterator();
894    while (iterator.hasNext()) {
895      Predicate subPredicate = iterator.next();
896      builder.append('(');
897      visit(subPredicate);
898      builder.append(')');
899      if (iterator.hasNext()) {
900        builder.append(op);
901      }
902    }
903    builder.append(')');
904  }
905
906  public void visitSimplePredicate(SimplePredicate<S> predicate, String op)
907      throws QueryBuildingException {
908    if (Number.class.isAssignableFrom(predicate.getKey().type())) {
909      if (SearchTypeValidator.isNumericRange(predicate.getValue())) {
910        if (Integer.class.equals(predicate.getKey().type())) {
911          visit(
912              toIntegerRangePredicate(
913                  SearchTypeValidator.parseIntegerRange(predicate.getValue()), predicate.getKey()));
914        } else {
915          visit(
916              toNumberRangePredicate(
917                  SearchTypeValidator.parseDecimalRange(predicate.getValue()), predicate.getKey()));
918        }
919        return;
920      }
921    }
922
923    if (sqlTermsMapper.includeNullInPredicate(predicate)) {
924      String column = SQLColumnsUtils.getSQLColumn(term(predicate.getKey()));
925      builder
926          .append('(')
927          .append(toSQLField(predicate.getKey(), predicate.isMatchCase()))
928          .append(op)
929          .append(toSQLValue(predicate.getKey(), predicate.getValue(), predicate.isMatchCase()))
930          .append(DISJUNCTION_OPERATOR)
931          .append(
932              isSQLArray(predicate.getKey())
933                  ? String.format(IS_NOT_NULL_ARRAY_OPERATOR, column)
934                  : column + IS_NULL_OPERATOR)
935          .append(')');
936    } else {
937      builder
938          .append(toSQLField(predicate.getKey(), predicate.isMatchCase()))
939          .append(op)
940          .append(toSQLValue(predicate.getKey(), predicate.getValue(), predicate.isMatchCase()));
941    }
942  }
943
944  public void visitSimplePredicate(SimplePredicate<S> predicate, String op, String value)
945      throws QueryBuildingException {
946    if (sqlTermsMapper.includeNullInPredicate(predicate)) {
947      String column = SQLColumnsUtils.getSQLColumn(term(predicate.getKey()));
948      builder
949          .append('(')
950          .append(toSQLField(predicate.getKey(), predicate.isMatchCase()))
951          .append(op)
952          .append(toSQLValue(predicate.getKey(), value, predicate.isMatchCase()))
953          .append(DISJUNCTION_OPERATOR)
954          .append(
955              isSQLArray(predicate.getKey())
956                  ? String.format(IS_NOT_NULL_ARRAY_OPERATOR, column)
957                  : column + IS_NULL_OPERATOR)
958          .append(')');
959    } else {
960      builder
961          .append(toSQLField(predicate.getKey(), predicate.isMatchCase()))
962          .append(op)
963          .append(toSQLValue(predicate.getKey(), value, predicate.isMatchCase()));
964    }
965  }
966
967  /** Determines if the parameter type is a Hive array. */
968  protected boolean isSQLArray(S parameter) {
969    return SQLColumnsUtils.getSQLType(term(parameter)).startsWith(SQL_ARRAY_PRE);
970  }
971
972  /** Term associated to a search parameter */
973  public Term term(S parameter) {
974    return sqlTermsMapper.term(parameter);
975  }
976
977  private void appendHumboldtTaxonFilter(String checklistKey, S parameter, String value) {
978    Objects.requireNonNull(checklistKey);
979
980    String field = HUMBOLDT_TAXON_COLUMNS.getOrDefault(parameter, null);
981
982    if (field == null) {
983      return;
984    }
985
986    builder
987        .append('(')
988        .append(
989            String.format(
990                "stringArrayContains(%s['%s']['%s'], '%s', true)",
991                SQLColumnsUtils.getSQLQueryColumn(EcoTerm.targetTaxonomicScope),
992                getChecklistKey(checklistKey),
993                field,
994                value))
995        .append(')');
996  }
997
998  private void appendHumboldtTaxonFilter(EqualsPredicate<S> taxonPredicate) {
999    appendHumboldtTaxonFilter(
1000        getChecklistKey(taxonPredicate.getChecklistKey()),
1001        taxonPredicate.getKey(),
1002        taxonPredicate.getValue());
1003  }
1004
1005  private void appendHumboldtTaxonFilter(InPredicate<S> taxonPredicate) {
1006    String field = HUMBOLDT_TAXON_COLUMNS.getOrDefault(taxonPredicate.getKey(), null);
1007
1008    if (field == null) {
1009      return;
1010    }
1011
1012    Set<String> taxonKeys =
1013        taxonPredicate.getValues().stream()
1014            .map(v -> toSQLValue(taxonPredicate.getKey(), v, true))
1015            .collect(Collectors.toSet());
1016
1017    builder
1018        .append('(')
1019        .append(
1020            String.format(
1021                "arrays_overlap(%s['%s']['%s'], array(%s))",
1022                SQLColumnsUtils.getSQLQueryColumn(EcoTerm.targetTaxonomicScope),
1023                getChecklistKey(taxonPredicate.getChecklistKey()),
1024                field,
1025                String.join(",", taxonKeys)))
1026        .append(')');
1027  }
1028
1029  private void appendHumboldtTaxonUnary(String checklistKey, String unaryOperator) {
1030    Objects.requireNonNull(checklistKey);
1031    builder.append('(');
1032    builder.append(
1033        String.format(
1034            "%s['%s']['%s'] " + unaryOperator,
1035            SQLColumnsUtils.getSQLQueryColumn(EcoTerm.targetTaxonomicScope),
1036            getChecklistKey(checklistKey),
1037            "usageName"));
1038    builder.append(')');
1039  }
1040
1041  /**
1042   * Searches any of the backbone keys in Hive of any rank, for multiple keys.
1043   *
1044   * @param taxonKeyPredicate to append as filter
1045   */
1046  private void appendTaxonomicBackboneArrayFilter(InPredicate<S> taxonKeyPredicate) {
1047    Collection<String> taxonKeys = taxonKeyPredicate.getValues();
1048
1049    builder.append('(');
1050    boolean first = true;
1051    for (Term term : NUB_KEYS) {
1052      if (!first) {
1053        builder.append(DISJUNCTION_OPERATOR);
1054      }
1055      builder
1056          .append(SQLColumnsUtils.getSQLQueryColumn(term))
1057          .append(IN_OPERATOR)
1058          .append("('")
1059          .append(String.join("','", taxonKeys))
1060          .append("')");
1061      first = false;
1062    }
1063    builder.append(')');
1064  }
1065
1066  /**
1067   * Searches any of the taxonomic classification keys in Hive of any rank.
1068   *
1069   * @param taxonKeyPredicate to append as filter
1070   */
1071  private void appendTaxonomicArrayFilter(EqualsPredicate<S> taxonKeyPredicate, Term term) {
1072
1073    builder
1074        .append('(')
1075        .append(
1076            String.format(
1077                "stringArrayContains(%s['%s'], '%s', true)",
1078                SQLColumnsUtils.getSQLQueryColumn(term),
1079                getChecklistKey(taxonKeyPredicate.getChecklistKey()),
1080                taxonKeyPredicate.getValue()))
1081        .append(')');
1082  }
1083
1084  /**
1085   * Searches any of the NUB keys in Hive of any rank.
1086   *
1087   * @param taxonKeyPredicate to append as filter
1088   */
1089  private void appendTaxonomicSingleValueFilter(EqualsPredicate<S> taxonKeyPredicate, Term term) {
1090
1091    builder
1092        .append('(')
1093        .append(
1094            String.format(
1095                "%s['%s'] = '%s'",
1096                SQLColumnsUtils.getSQLQueryColumn(term),
1097                getChecklistKey(taxonKeyPredicate.getChecklistKey()),
1098                taxonKeyPredicate.getValue()))
1099        .append(')');
1100  }
1101
1102  /** Creates a disjunction of all the given terms. */
1103  private void appendGadmFilterList(List<? extends Term> terms, String value) {
1104    builder
1105        .append('(')
1106        .append(
1107            terms.stream()
1108                .map(
1109                    term ->
1110                        SQLColumnsUtils.getSQLQueryColumn(term)
1111                            + EQUALS_OPERATOR
1112                            + "'"
1113                            + value
1114                            + "'")
1115                .collect(Collectors.joining(DISJUNCTION_OPERATOR)))
1116        .append(')');
1117  }
1118
1119  /**
1120   * Searches any of the NUB keys in Hive of any rank, for multiple keys.
1121   *
1122   * @param taxonomicPredicate to append as filter
1123   */
1124  private void appendTaxonomicArrayFilter(InPredicate<S> taxonomicPredicate, Term term) {
1125    Set<String> taxonKeys =
1126        taxonomicPredicate.getValues().stream()
1127            .map(v -> toSQLValue(taxonomicPredicate.getKey(), v, true))
1128            .collect(Collectors.toSet());
1129
1130    builder
1131        .append('(')
1132        .append(
1133            String.format(
1134                "arrays_overlap(%s['%s'], array(%s))",
1135                SQLColumnsUtils.getSQLQueryColumn(term),
1136                getChecklistKey(taxonomicPredicate.getChecklistKey()),
1137                String.join(",", taxonKeys)))
1138        .append(')');
1139  }
1140
1141  /**
1142   * Searches any of the NUB keys in Hive of any rank, for multiple keys.
1143   *
1144   * @param taxonomicPredicate to append as filter
1145   */
1146  private void appendTaxonomicSingleValueFilter(InPredicate<S> taxonomicPredicate, Term term) {
1147
1148    Collection<String> taxonKeys = taxonomicPredicate.getValues();
1149
1150    builder.append('(');
1151    boolean first = true;
1152    for (String taxonKey : taxonKeys) {
1153      if (!first) {
1154        builder.append(DISJUNCTION_OPERATOR);
1155      }
1156      builder
1157          .append('(')
1158          .append(
1159              String.format(
1160                  "%s['%s'] = '%s'",
1161                  SQLColumnsUtils.getSQLQueryColumn(term),
1162                  getChecklistKey(taxonomicPredicate.getChecklistKey()),
1163                  taxonKey))
1164          .append(')');
1165      first = false;
1166    }
1167    builder.append(')');
1168  }
1169
1170  /**
1171   * Searches every level of GADM GID in Hive for multiple keys.
1172   *
1173   * @param gadmGids to append as filter
1174   */
1175  private void appendGadmGidFilter(Collection<String> gadmGids) {
1176    builder.append('(');
1177    boolean first = true;
1178    for (Term term : GADM_GIDS) {
1179      if (!first) {
1180        builder.append(DISJUNCTION_OPERATOR);
1181      }
1182      builder.append(SQLColumnsUtils.getSQLQueryColumn(term)).append(IN_OPERATOR).append('(');
1183      Iterator<String> iterator = gadmGids.iterator();
1184      while (iterator.hasNext()) {
1185        // Hardcoded GADM_LEVEL_0_GID since the type of all these parameters is the same.
1186        // Using .toUpperCase() is safe, GIDs must be ASCII anyway.
1187        builder.append(
1188            toSQLValue(sqlTermsMapper.getDefaultGadmLevel(), iterator.next().toUpperCase(), true));
1189        if (iterator.hasNext()) {
1190          builder.append(", ");
1191        }
1192      }
1193      builder.append(")");
1194      first = false;
1195    }
1196    builder.append(')');
1197  }
1198
1199  /**
1200   * Searches any of the NUB keys in Hive of any rank.
1201   *
1202   * @param unaryOperator to append as filter
1203   */
1204  private void appendUnaryList(List<? extends Term> terms, String unaryOperator) {
1205    builder.append('(');
1206    builder.append(
1207        terms.stream()
1208            .map(term -> SQLColumnsUtils.getSQLQueryColumn(term) + unaryOperator)
1209            .collect(Collectors.joining(CONJUNCTION_OPERATOR)));
1210    builder.append(')');
1211  }
1212
1213  /**
1214   * Converts decimal range into a predicate with the form: field >= range.lower AND field <=
1215   * range.upper.
1216   */
1217  private Predicate toNumberRangePredicate(Range<Double> range, S key) {
1218    if (!range.hasLowerBound()) {
1219      return new LessThanOrEqualsPredicate<S>(
1220          key, String.valueOf(range.upperEndpoint().doubleValue()));
1221    }
1222    if (!range.hasUpperBound()) {
1223      return new GreaterThanOrEqualsPredicate<S>(
1224          key, String.valueOf(range.lowerEndpoint().doubleValue()));
1225    }
1226
1227    List<Predicate> predicates =
1228        List.of(
1229            new GreaterThanOrEqualsPredicate<S>(
1230                key, String.valueOf(range.lowerEndpoint().doubleValue())),
1231            new LessThanOrEqualsPredicate<S>(
1232                key, String.valueOf(range.upperEndpoint().doubleValue())));
1233    return new ConjunctionPredicate(predicates);
1234  }
1235
1236  /**
1237   * Converts integer range into a predicate with the form: field >= range.lower AND field <=
1238   * range.upper.
1239   */
1240  private Predicate toIntegerRangePredicate(Range<Integer> range, S key) {
1241    if (!range.hasLowerBound()) {
1242      return new LessThanOrEqualsPredicate<S>(
1243          key, String.valueOf(range.upperEndpoint().intValue()));
1244    }
1245    if (!range.hasUpperBound()) {
1246      return new GreaterThanOrEqualsPredicate<S>(
1247          key, String.valueOf(range.lowerEndpoint().intValue()));
1248    }
1249
1250    List<Predicate> predicates =
1251        List.of(
1252            new GreaterThanOrEqualsPredicate<S>(
1253                key, String.valueOf(range.lowerEndpoint().intValue())),
1254            new LessThanOrEqualsPredicate<S>(
1255                key, String.valueOf(range.upperEndpoint().intValue())));
1256    return new ConjunctionPredicate(predicates);
1257  }
1258
1259  private void visit(Object object) throws QueryBuildingException {
1260    Method method = null;
1261    try {
1262      method = getClass().getMethod("visit", new Class[] {object.getClass()});
1263    } catch (NoSuchMethodException e) {
1264      log.warn(
1265          "Visit method could not be found. That means a unknown Predicate has been passed", e);
1266      throw new IllegalArgumentException("Unknown Predicate", e);
1267    }
1268    try {
1269      method.invoke(this, object);
1270    } catch (IllegalAccessException e) {
1271      log.error(
1272          "This error shouldn't occur if all visit methods are public. Probably a programming error",
1273          e);
1274      throw new RuntimeException(e);
1275    } catch (InvocationTargetException e) {
1276      log.info("Exception thrown while building the query", e);
1277      throw new QueryBuildingException(e);
1278    }
1279  }
1280
1281  private boolean isHumboldtTaxonParameter(S parameter) {
1282    return HUMBOLDT_TAXON_COLUMNS.containsKey(parameter);
1283  }
1284
1285  private String getChecklistKey(String checklistKey) {
1286    return !isNullOrEmpty(checklistKey) ? checklistKey : defaultChecklistKey;
1287  }
1288
1289  public static boolean isNullOrEmpty(@Nullable String string) {
1290    return string == null || string.isEmpty();
1291  }
1292}
